specific_mechanism: Some DNA methylation marks survive meiosis and are inherited transgenerationally, encoding ancestral environmental information without changing genome sequence
llm_application: LLM 'epigenetic' inheritance via fine-tune metadata: encode session-specific adaptations as recoverable metadata layer that survives base-model versioning without altering base weights.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes developmental-biology feedback-attenuation mapping as proposed.
